title: Senior Solidity Developer for DeFi Yield Protocol
raw_text:
We are looking for a senior Solidity developer to join our DeFi yield protocol team. You will design and implement smart contracts for automated yield strategies on Ethereum mainnet.

Requirements:
- 3+ years Solidity experience
- Deep knowledge of DeFi protocols (Aave, Compound, Uniswap)
- Experience with Hardhat/Foundry testing frameworks
- Understanding of MEV, flash loans, reentrancy attacks
- TypeScript for off-chain tooling

Budget: $120-150/hr contract, 20-30 hours/week, ongoing
Remote friendly. Immediate start. UTC+0 to UTC+8 preferred.

Apply with your GitHub and 2 relevant DeFi projects.

title: ElizaOS Agent Developer — Autonomous Trading Bot
raw_text:
We need an experienced ElizaOS developer to build an autonomous trading agent that monitors on-chain signals and executes trades on Uniswap v3.

Scope:
- ElizaOS v2 agent architecture
- On-chain data ingestion (price feeds, liquidity events)
- Trade execution via Ethers.js
- Risk management rules
- Docker deployment

Budget: $8,000 fixed price, 3-week timeline. Milestone-based payment.

We want this done ASAP — ideally start within the week.

title: React + Node.js Developer for SaaS Dashboard
raw_text:
Looking for a full-stack developer to build a customer analytics dashboard for our B2B SaaS platform.

Tech stack: React + TypeScript frontend, Node.js/Express API, PostgreSQL.

Features needed:
- Real-time metrics dashboard
- User segmentation filters
- CSV/PDF export
- Role-based access control

Rate: $60-80/hr. Estimated 120 hours of work. Remote, async-friendly.

title: AI Python Developer — LLM Fine-Tuning Pipeline
raw_text:
We need a Python ML engineer to build a fine-tuning pipeline for our domain-specific LLM.

Responsibilities:
- Set up LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning with Hugging Face
- Data preprocessing and cleaning pipeline
- Evaluation benchmarks
- Deploy via Docker on AWS

Rate: ~$100/hr, 40 hours initial scope with potential for long-term engagement.
Must have previous LLM fine-tuning experience.

title: Junior WordPress developer needed
raw_text: Need a WordPress developer to help maintain our company blog. Mostly plugin updates, theme customization, and occasional page creation. No complex development. Entry level is fine. $10/hr, ongoing small tasks. Anyone interested?
